summary: Resume builder app with text color visibility fix and image download (PNG/JPG) feature.
known_issues: Text color matches background, making text invisible

existing_features.title: Fix text color visibility in the resume preview and form so that all text is clearly legible against its background. Audit all CSS custom properties and inline styles in ResumePreview.tsx, ResumeForm.tsx, and index.css to ensure foreground colors have sufficient contrast against background colors in both light and dark themes.

Add a 'Download as Image' button to the resume builder UI (in the sticky header alongside the existing Save as HTML button) that captures the rendered resume preview as a PNG image and triggers a browser download. Use html2canvas or a similar DOM-to-canvas approach to capture the ResumePreview component, then convert the canvas to a PNG blob and download it as 'resume.png'. Profile photos must be included in the captured image.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix text color visibility (text blending into background)
Add Download as Image (PNG/JPG) option to capture resume as a photo
